title: riboflow_genome_DSL2 pipeline parameters
description: Ribosome-profiling genome alignment pipeline (DSL2). Mirrors the params used by example_position.yaml.

input.description: Reference files and per-sample FASTQ lanes.

genome.description: STAR genome index directory (SA, SAindex, Genome, chrNameLength.txt).

fastq_base.description: Optional prefix prepended to every FASTQ path.

fastq.description: Map of sample name -> list of single-end FASTQ lanes.

dedup_method.description: none = skip; position = coordinate-based (rfc); umicollapse = UMI-aware.

deduplicate.description: Legacy flag: true routes dedup_method=none to 'position'.

umi_tools_extract_arguments.description: Extra flags for umi_tools extract (umicollapse path).

output_transcriptome_bam.description: Emit STAR transcriptome-projected BAM and run transcriptome dedup.

mapping_quality_cutoff.description: Minimum MAPQ for the quality-pass filter.

ribo_filter_flags.description: samtools view -F FLAG mask for the quality-pass filter.

do_rnaseq.description: RNA-seq path is NOT yet migrated to DSL2; rnaseq.* params are ignored with a warning.

run.description: Run STAR genome alignment + stats. Set false for transcriptome-only runs (transcriptome.run must be true).
Run bowtie2 transcriptome alignment → ribopy .ribo + stats.

mapping_quality_cutoff.description: Minimum MAPQ for the transcriptome quality-pass filter (bowtie2 max MAPQ ~42).
